reasoning: I am voting for Shantanu again, but not the way I felt in 2019. The citizenship window is real now—the rules came in March, and yes, only fourteen certificates by today, but my parents can finally apply. I have learned not to expect miracles from either side, and I have seen both play politics with our community. But right now, only this path is moving on what matters most to me—making my parents legally belong to this country. Biswajit Das is just a man changing sides for votes, and the Left will never give us what they do not even talk about. So I mark the lotus, not from hope anymore, but because the thing I voted for in 2019 is finally happening, even if it is slower than anyone promised.
primary_drivers: CAA citizenship process now actually begun—rules real, not just speeches
Shantanu at least stayed with the community through the slow delivery
Pragmatic choice: only this path is processing what my parents need most
